agent_id: # Template for cross-architecture scaffold data contributions.

# scaffold_identity_kb: identity scaffold size in KB (SOUL.md
# scaffold_context_kb: context scaffold size in KB (memory
# scaffold_compressed_kb: compressed scaffold size in KB (briefing digests
session_id: cycle summaries — derived from raw scaffold)

agent_id: # scaffold_total_kb: total scaffold loaded at session start (may include operational scaffold beyond identity+context+compressed)
# trigger_type: session trigger type — warm (active session resumed)
# tfpa_estimate: time to first productive action in seconds (leave blank if not instrumented)
# orientation_density: qualitative rating (high/medium/low) or numeric (0.0-1.0) if measured
# notes: free text — cold start observations

notes: every T2 cycle is a forced cold start
human message trigger — recent daily log present
heartbeat poll — main session alive but idle
cron event — isolated session full reconstruction
